hook: Your brain decides before you do.
reveal: Neural signals appear milliseconds before conscious choice.

hook: You remember emotions more than events.
reveal: Your brain prioritizes feelings over exact details in memory.

hook: Space is completely silent.
reveal: There’s no air to carry sound waves in space.

hook: Earth hums constantly.
reveal: Low-frequency vibrations come from ocean waves.

hook: Octopuses have three hearts.
reveal: Two pump blood to the gills, one to the rest of the body.

hook: Your body glows in the dark.
reveal: Humans emit tiny amounts of light invisible to the eye.

hook: India has a floating post office.
reveal: It operates on Dal Lake in Srinagar.

hook: Cleopatra lived closer to the Moon landing.
reveal: She lived closer to 1969 than to the pyramids being built.

hook: The first computer bug was a real bug.
reveal: A moth was found stuck in a computer in 1947.

hook: You check your phone without thinking.
reveal: It’s driven by a dopamine feedback loop.

hook: Some places on Earth have no explanation.
reveal: Events like the Bermuda Triangle still lack clear answers.

hook: We’ve explored less than 10% of the ocean.
reveal: Most of the deep sea remains unknown.

hook: Honey never spoils.
reveal: Jars of honey found in tombs are still edible.

hook: You think in language silently.
reveal: Your brain uses internal speech for reasoning.

hook: The internet started as a military project.
reveal: ARPANET was built for secure communication.

hook: Every culture has unique greetings.
reveal: From bows to handshakes, greetings vary globally.

hook: Lightning is hotter than the sun.
reveal: It can reach temperatures five times hotter than the sun’s surface.

hook: The longest hiccup lasted decades.
reveal: A man hiccupped for 68 years straight.

hook: You only use 10% of your brain.
reveal: False—almost all parts of the brain are used.

hook: AI may predict your actions.
reveal: Advanced models can already anticipate behavior patterns.
